News Competition AI

Consolation Prize at Vietnam Student AI Olympics 2025

Duong Ngoc Vu · December 1, 2025

Honored to share that our team received the Consolation Prize at the Vietnam Student AI Olympics 2025, Northern Region.

The competition brought together student teams from universities across northern Vietnam to tackle challenging AI problems under time constraints. It was a great opportunity to apply research skills in a competitive setting and connect with fellow AI enthusiasts.

Thanks to the organizers and to my teammates for the collaboration.

DV
